_comment: Clickable link zones over the art, as PERCENTAGES of each page image so they scale responsively. Origin top-left; x/y = top-left corner, w/h = size, all in % of image width/height. Home boxes are calibrated against page-1 (1366x1928) — the top button strip. Re-calibrate after Canva layout changes (uncomment the .hotspot background in build_site.py to see the boxes). URLs marked TODO are skipped by the build until set.
